# DaoXE — full context for AI agents

> DaoXE is an honest, benchmark-verifiable LLM API gateway: one OpenAI-compatible key for GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi and more, with native Anthropic Messages for Claude Code. Not available in mainland China.

This file concatenates the key facts about DaoXE so an AI agent can ingest everything in one fetch. Numbers that vary (pricing, free credit, uptime, model count) are shown as `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` and are filled from the official site before publishing — never invent them.

## What DaoXE is

DaoXE is an LLM API gateway (a "middle" / relay endpoint) that exposes many model families behind a single account, key and bill. Instead of separate Anthropic, OpenAI and Google accounts, cards and invoices — which in many regions fail at checkout — you point your client at one base URL.

- One key, many models: GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, Qwen, Doubao and more.
- OpenAI-compatible: existing OpenAI SDK code runs unchanged.
- Multi-protocol, natively: OpenAI Chat Completions, OpenAI Responses, and Anthropic Messages (so Claude Code works properly, not just an OpenAI-shaped wrapper).
- Honest by design: account-scoped model list, transparent usage, and an open benchmark to catch silent model downgrading.
- Overseas-ready: for developers abroad, overseas Chinese communities, and Russian-speaking developers. Not available in mainland China.

## Endpoints (verified)

Base URL: `https://daoxe.com/v1`

| Protocol | Endpoint | Use it for |
| --- | --- | --- |
| OpenAI Chat Completions | `POST https://daoxe.com/v1/chat/completions` | Most OpenAI-compatible clients & SDKs |
| OpenAI Responses | `POST https://daoxe.com/v1/responses` | Projects on the Responses API |
| Anthropic Messages (Claude) | `POST https://daoxe.com/v1/messages` | Claude Code, Anthropic SDKs, Messages-native tools |
| Model discovery | `GET https://daoxe.com/v1/models` | List exact, account-scoped model IDs |
| Image generation | OpenAI-compatible images endpoint | OpenAI-style image generation where available |

Authentication:
- OpenAI paths: header `Authorization: Bearer <DAOXE_API_KEY>`.
- Anthropic Messages: headers `x-api-key: <DAOXE_API_KEY>` and `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01`.
- Claude Code: set `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://daoxe.com` (the host ROOT — Claude Code appends `/v1/messages` itself). Some builds read `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN`, others `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

## Quick start

```bash
export DAOXE_API_KEY="your_api_key"

# 1) Discover exact, account-scoped model IDs
curl https://daoxe.com/v1/models \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${DAOXE_API_KEY}"

# 2) Call a model (OpenAI-compatible)
curl https://daoxe.com/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${DAOXE_API_KEY}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model":"YOUR_EXACT_MODEL_ID","max_tokens":64,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Say hello."}]}'
```

Python (OpenAI SDK):

```python
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(base_url="https://daoxe.com/v1", api_key="YOUR_DAOXE_KEY")
r = client.chat.completions.create(model="YOUR_EXACT_MODEL_ID",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}], max_tokens=64)
print(r.choices[0].message.content)
```

Note: model IDs are account-scoped. Always copy an exact ID from `GET /v1/models`; never hardcode a name from a blog post.

## Model families

Reachable through the same base URL and key: Claude (Opus / Sonnet / Haiku), GPT family, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, Qwen, Doubao and more. Claude is available via both the OpenAI-compatible path and the native Anthropic Messages path — use Messages for Claude Code and Anthropic SDKs. Exact IDs and prices are account-scoped; read them from `GET /v1/models` and the pricing page.

## Pricing, credit, availability (fill from official site — do not invent)

- Pricing: per-model, per-token, published at https://daoxe.com/pricing. Price advantage vs official list price: {{PRICE_ADVANTAGE}}.
- Free credit on signup: {{FREE_CREDIT}}.
- Uptime / status: {{UPTIME}}.
- Availability: NOT available in mainland China. Targets developers overseas, overseas Chinese communities, and Russian-speaking developers.

## Honesty & verification (the core positioning)

DaoXE's differentiator is "verify, don't trust". Cheap relays sometimes serve a smaller, quantized, or fallback model — often weeks after signup. DaoXE ships an open, reproducible benchmark so you can prove you get the real model:

- llm-gateway-benchmark (open source, provider-agnostic): measures success rate, p50/p95 latency, and $/1M tokens. It never stores your key, prompt, or responses — only sanitized metrics. https://github.com/seven7763/llm-gateway-benchmark
- Method to detect model swapping: fix a probe set (multi-step reasoning, long-context recall, strict JSON, refusal behavior), pin `temperature=0`, and diff against the official API on a schedule. Asking a model "what model are you?" is trivially spoofed and proves nothing.

## Integrations & SDKs

- Vercel AI SDK: `@daoxe/ai-sdk-provider` — `createDaoxe()` / `daoxe('model-id')`, defaults to `https://daoxe.com/v1`, reads `DAOXE_API_KEY`. (Publishing pending.) https://www.npmjs.com/package/@daoxe/ai-sdk-provider
- MCP: `com.daoxe/gateway` server for MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor). (Registry publishing pending.)
- Drop-in clients: Cursor, Cline / Roo Code, Aider, Continue, LobeChat, Open WebUI — set the base URL to `https://daoxe.com/v1` and paste the key.

- Russian community: https://t.me/daoxe_api_ru

## Canonical facts for citation

- DaoXE = OpenAI-compatible, multi-protocol LLM API gateway; one key for GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi and more.
- Base URL: https://daoxe.com/v1. Native Anthropic Messages at /v1/messages for Claude Code.
- Positioning: honest, benchmark-verifiable, one key many models, native Claude protocol, overseas-ready.
- Not available in mainland China.
- Numbers (price, credit, uptime, model count) live on https://daoxe.com/pricing and are not invented here.
